title: Sorting Boards
excerpt:
Hello, Is it possible to sort Boards in alphabetical order in the left panel? I saw some screen shots with this feature but i don’t see it in my Monday. It is a pain to manually order them. 
We have the Pro Plan.

posts.author: Thibault (Thibault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, Is it possible to sort Boards in alphabetical order in the left panel? I saw some screen shots with this feature but i don’t see it in my Monday. It is a pain to manually order them.
We have the Pro Plan.
